calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-26-2005 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up
Off Calendar Apr-05-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: his cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Leticai Perez.
Robert Shepard, Esq. for Plaintiff: Gopal Chopra, also presetn, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Abubaker Hansia aka Abu Hansia dba California Direct Imports.
Matter is submitted, proposed judgment received in court, and matter is taken undersubmission.
3:00 P.M.
Judgment granted as follows:
Principal $41,901.35
Punitive damages $125,704.05
Costs $332.50
Total of $167,937.90
Judgment signed by Comm. Kaplan.
